title: Add social links, Join Us, Contact, and featured notice to site

requirements.text: Update the Contact page (`frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx`) to replace or supplement the existing placeholder content with real official links: a prominent 'Join Us' call-to-action button linking to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ (opens in a new tab with `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`), and a 'Contact Us' button or section linking to https://www.albd.org/pages/contact-en (opens in a new tab). Style both links as primary action buttons consistent with the site's green/gold/cream theme.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Join Us' button is visible on the Contact page and links to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ opening in a new tab.
A 'Contact Us' button or section is visible on the Contact page and links to https://www.albd.org/pages/contact-en opening in a new tab.
Both buttons are styled consistently with the site's existing green/gold/cream theme.

requirements.text: Add social media links to the site-wide footer (`frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx`): Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/awamileague.1949/), Twitter/X (https://twitter.com/albd1971), and YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/user/myalbd/). Display them as recognisable icon links (using Lucide icons or inline SVG labels) in a 'Follow Us' or 'Social Media' subsection of the footer. All links must open in a new tab with `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'` and be styled consistently with the footer's existing green/gold/cream visual conventions.
acceptanceCriteria: Facebook link to https://www.facebook.com/awamileague.1949/ is present in the footer and opens in a new tab.
Twitter/X link to https://twitter.com/albd1971 is present in the footer and opens in a new tab.
YouTube link to https://www.youtube.com/user/myalbd/ is present in the footer and opens in a new tab.
All three social links are visually grouped in a dedicated 'Follow Us' or equivalent subsection.
All links use `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`.

requirements.text: Add a 'Join Us' link to the site-wide Navbar (`frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx`) pointing to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ and opening in a new tab with `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`. Display it as a distinct call-to-action button (e.g., outlined or filled with gold/red accent) in both the desktop menu and the mobile hamburger menu, positioned after the existing navigation items.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Join Us' button appears in the desktop navbar linking to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ and opening in a new tab.
The same 'Join Us' button appears in the mobile hamburger menu.
The button is visually distinct from regular nav links (e.g., accented colour).
The link uses `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`.

requirements.text: Add a featured notice banner or card to the homepage (`frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx`) displaying a highlighted announcement that links to the article at https://www.albd.org/articles/news/41681/Sajeeb-Wazed-Urges-International-Community-to-Save-Bangladesh-from-Falling-in-Grasp-of-Islamic-Extremists. The notice should display a short descriptive heading (e.g., 'Latest Notice' or 'Featured Announcement'), a brief summary sentence drawn from the article title ('Sajeeb Wazed Urges International Community to Save Bangladesh from Falling in Grasp of Islamic Extremists'), and a 'Read More' link opening the URL in a new tab with `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`. Style the notice as a prominent card or banner consistent with the site's green/gold/cream theme, placed in a visible position such as below the hero section or above the navigation cards.
acceptanceCriteria: A featured notice card or banner is visible on the homepage.
The notice includes a heading such as 'Latest Notice' or 'Featured Announcement'.
The notice includes the article title 'Sajeeb Wazed Urges International Community to Save Bangladesh from Falling in Grasp of Islamic Extremists' as a summary or subheading.
A 'Read More' or equivalent link opens https://www.albd.org/articles/news/41681/Sajeeb-Wazed-Urges-International-Community-to-Save-Bangladesh-from-Falling-in-Grasp-of-Islamic-Extremists in a new tab.
The link uses `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`.
The notice is styled consistently with the site's green/gold/cream theme.

requirements.text: Add a 'Join Us' link to the site-wide footer (`frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx`) under the existing navigation links section, pointing to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ and opening in a new tab with `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`. Style it consistently with other footer navigation links.
acceptanceCriteria: A 'Join Us' link appears in the footer navigation links section.
The link points to https://www.albd.org/join-us/ and opens in a new tab.
The link uses `target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'`.
The link is styled consistently with existing footer navigation links.

constraints: Do not modify any file listed under frontend.immutablePaths.
All external links must use target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'.
Preserve all existing navigation items and footer links; only add new ones.
nonGoals: Creating new backend endpoints or Motoko changes.
Embedding live social media feeds or widgets.
Fetching or scraping content from any of the linked URLs.
Creating a new dedicated social media page or route.
